name: a2_secret_audit
outcome_goal: One operator_decisions row, decision.2026-04-20.secret-path-inventory, lists every callsite that reads a credential, grouped by whether it already flows through adapters/keychain.py.
verify_command: bash -lc "hits=$(rg 'api[_-]?key|OPENAI_API_KEY|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY|DEEPSEEK_API_KEY|GEMINI_API_KEY|resolve_credential|keychain' --type py 'Code&DBs/Workflow' -l | wc -l | tr -d ' '); recorded=$(psql postgresql://localhost:5432/praxis -tAc \"SELECT COALESCE(substring(rationale FROM 'callsite_count=([0-9]+)'),'0') FROM operator_decisions WHERE decision_key='decision.2026-04-20.secret-path-inventory' ORDER BY decided_at DESC LIMIT 1\"); test \"$hits\" = \"$recorded\""

jobs.label: a2_secret_audit
jobs.prompt: Audit every credential read path. Targets: Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/keychain.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/credentials.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/oauth_lifecycle.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/registry/provider_execution_registry.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integrations/connector_executor.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/execution_backends.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/memory/ingest.py. Search with: rg 'api[_-]?key|OPENAI_API_KEY|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY|DEEPSEEK_API_KEY|GEMINI_API_KEY|resolve_credential|keychain' --type py 'Code&DBs/Workflow' -l. File operator_decisions key decision.2026-04-20.secret-path-inventory whose rationale contains callsite_count=<N>, keychain_backed=<list>, non_keychain=<list>. File bugs secret-path::<callsite> for any plaintext env/API-key path that should route through keychain. Transport constraint: use admitted CLI transport only; do not use llm_task, HTTP API routes, Anthropic routes, or deprecated Claude 4.6 slugs.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "hits=$(rg 'api[_-]?key|OPENAI_API_KEY|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY|DEEPSEEK_API_KEY|GEMINI_API_KEY|resolve_credential|keychain' --type py 'Code&DBs/Workflow' -l | wc -l | tr -d ' '); recorded=$(psql postgresql://localhost:5432/praxis -tAc \"SELECT COALESCE(substring(rationale FROM 'callsite_count=([0-9]+)'),'0') FROM operator_decisions WHERE decision_key='decision.2026-04-20.secret-path-inventory' ORDER BY decided_at DESC LIMIT 1\"); test \"$hits\" = \"$recorded\""
